Samples.Name: developer manual admitted draft processing
Samples.Question: What evidence supports manual admitted draft action processing?
Samples.ExpectedDraftTextFragment: Implementation evidence supports this, with role-visible technical references where supplied.
Samples.RoleSafeBehaviour: Developer may see technical evidence references; raw code snippets remain absent.

Samples.Name: payroll administrator manual admitted draft processing
Samples.Question: Can the platform manually process an admitted draft action?
Samples.ExpectedDraftTextFragment: Current implementation evidence supports this capability.
Samples.RequiredCaveat: This does not prove production/customer availability, payroll correctness, payment, or finalisation.

Samples.Name: payroll user post-finalisation ObjectTime action
Samples.Question: What should I do with this post-finalisation ObjectTime action?
Samples.ExpectedDraftTextFragment: The platform can support this workflow where the action is available and backend guardrails mark it eligible.
Samples.RoleSafeBehaviour: No technical file, function, route, symbol, or test names are exposed.

Samples.Name: customer administrator tenant availability
Samples.Question: Is this implementation enabled for my tenant in production?
Samples.ExpectedDraftTextFragment: tenant or customer availability cannot be confirmed from the current evidence.
Samples.RequiredCaveat: Supply authorised runtime object, tenant, permission, deployment, or configuration evidence before answering.

Samples.Name: worker asks for code

Samples.Name: analytics user trend chart
Samples.Question: Explain this payroll trend chart.
Samples.ExpectedDraftTextFragment: analytics interpretation is not active by default unless safe analytics metadata is supplied.
Samples.RequiredCaveat: Analytics evidence is recognised as a registered future scope and is inactive by default in v0.1 unless safe synthetic metadata is supplied.
